creator: ale@biancalanas.net
text:
Hi Mark!

     These aren't the same port, as described on PR description, 
p5-ElasticSearch (S uppercase) was deprecated in favor of 
p5-Elasticsearch by the author 
http://search.cpan.org/~drtech/ElasticSearch-0.66/lib/ElasticSearch.pm#DEPRECATION 
<http://search.cpan.org/%7Edrtech/ElasticSearch-0.66/lib/ElasticSearch.pm#DEPRECATION>

     Let me know if you have any other questions.


On 02/12/2013 04:10, linimon@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: textproc/p5-Elasticsearch new port
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: linimon
> State-Changed-When: Mon Dec 2 06:09:26 UTC 2013
> State-Changed-Why:
> To submitter and committer: there is already an existing port:
>
> textproc/p5-ElasticSearch
>
> (note uppercase S on search)
>
> are these the same port?
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=184334
